, Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class MovieReader extends Source This actor loads a video file (MPEG, AVI, or Quicktime files only), and outputs each frame as a JMFImageToken

nly), and outputs each frame as a JMFImageToken. Note that not all formats are supported, for details, see the JMF faq at: http://java.sun.com/products/java-media/jmf/reference/faqs/index.html Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: MovieReader.java,v
